description_long: This object is a large, angular stone block with a faceted, geometric shape and a matte gray surface. The block has a polygonal form with sharp edges and flat faces, giving it a modern, stylized appearance. On one side, a small tuft of green grass or plant is growing at the base, suggesting some integration with natural surroundings. The stone's surface is uniform in color, with no visible markings, engravings, or significant weathering. Its size and mass make it suitable as a barrier or obstacle in an urban environment, such as a park or sidewalk. The overall look is clean and minimalistic, with a hard, rough texture typical of quarried stone.
description: A large, angular gray stone block with flat faces and a small tuft of grass at its base. The surface is matte and unmarked, giving it a clean, modern appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broadest face of the stone block with a visible tuft of grass on the left side.
description_view_1: Top-down angled view highlights the faceted, polygonal shape and the block's angular geometry.
description_view_2: Rear view displays another flat face with the tuft of grass now on the right, emphasizing the block's depth.
description_view_3: Side view focuses on the pointed end of the block and the grass tuft emerging from the base.
attribute_installation_method: set in soil or partially embedded in the ground
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering or erosion; surface appears clean and well-maintained.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated with minor integration to natural ground cover
